title: find_flux_loops — energy/redox/mass loop (EGC) detection in MSFBAUtils
scope: Add four utilities to MSFBAUtils (ms_fba_utils.py) to audit a ModelSEED MSTemplate for energy-generating cycles: build closed full model from template, add balanced probe drains (atp/redox/mass catalog), LP-maximize in closed system, minimize active reaction set via ReactionUse binaries on active reactions only, scan perturbation space, report loop+directions.

key_decisions.purpose: QC EGC audit (not biological loop enumeration)
key_decisions.input: MSTemplate only; build full closed cobra model via MSTemplateReaction.to_reaction preserving directionality
key_decisions.targets: synthetic balanced probe reactions added from a module catalog keyed by group (atp/redox/mass/all) or a custom reaction object
key_decisions.redox_probe: balanced drain releasing H2 (reduced -> oxidized + H2 +/- H+); no H2 sink opened; convention tunable after empirical run
key_decisions.scaling: LP-max probe -> LP-min total flux -> ReactionUsePkg fu/ru binaries ONLY on active reactions -> minimize sum of binaries; strip binaries between loops; no global MILP
key_decisions.output: defect list per probe: loop reactions + direction_used + flux + reliability_score + is_core + alternatives/coupled/essential; no fix prescribed
key_decisions.enumeration: per-reaction knockout perturbation scan (generalizes analyze_minimal_reaction_set) + integer-cut between distinct loops up to max_loops_per_probe

test_targets: find_flux_loops end-to-end (known EGC reported; clean template -> empty)
add_probe_reaction (correct stoichiometry/annotation; reuse existing not duplicate)
model unmodified after audit (probes + use-vars stripped)
out_of_scope: global min-count MILP over all template reactions
open_items: redox probe H2-recycling dependency: run on a real ModelSEED template early and inspect redox results before finalizing the redox catalog convention
